root.sql:
select sc_mem_edit_group.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_edit_group.membership_no) as memname , trim(sc_mem_edit_group.pre_member_group_no)||' '||trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_edit_group.pre_member_group_no)) as group_old_name , trim(sc_mem_edit_group.member_group_no)||' '||trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_edit_group.member_group_no)) as group_new_name , sc_mem_edit_group.entry_id , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_edit_group.entry_date,'DD/MM/YYYY')as entry_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_edit_group.entry_date,'HH24:MI:SS')as entry_time from sc_mem_edit_group where 1=1 --and sc_mem_edit_group.membership_no = '023808'
/*---------------------[ วันที่ ]------------------------*/ and to_date(sc_mem_edit_group.entry_date) between to_date('!entry_date_1!','dd/mm/yyyy') and to_date('!entry_date_2!','dd/mm/yyyy') /*WHERE*/ order by pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_edit_group.entry_date,'DD/MM/YYYY') , sc_mem_edit_group.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_edit_group.entry_date,'HH24:MI:SS')
